LOGO INSTRUCTIONS
=================

Please add your company logo file named "logo.png" to this public folder.

The logo should be the VISAKHA INTERNATIONAL COURIERS logo as shown in the admin page design.

The logo will be automatically displayed in:
- Admin Login page
- Admin Dashboard header
- Generated PDF invoices

Supported formats: PNG, JPG, SVG
Recommended size: 200x80 pixels or similar aspect ratio
